violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the dishwashing area was blocked by a storage rack. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026
The gasket to the walk-in cooler door was observed torn and not in good repair. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3 bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. Pre-flush sprayer to be adjusted to allow for the proper air gap when hanging above the sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in need of repair... - Floor tiles were observed to be in poor repair (Cracked/Chipped). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2026

The floor in the office and storage areas was observed to have an accumulation of droppings and debris. Physical facilities are to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean and to aid in the current pest control program. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026

At the time of inspection, the establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered/licensed with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. (Individual currently taking food safety course and test to become Registered Certified food safety manager for the location. Successful completion and submission of application to RIDOH CFP to be submitted to inspector.) (Currently no hot holding of food items being conducted.) Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

At the time of inspection, the sanitizing solution dispenser on the wall was observed to not be dispensing properly. PIC is to ensure the sanitizing solution at the 3 bay sink is manually mixed and tested whenever needed for proper washing/rinsing/sanitizing of equipment and utensils. Per the PIC, a workorder is in place currently. (Sanitizer was properly setup at the time of inspection.) Call for service made same day. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

At the time of inspection, there was no individual on site certified in food safety. There is to be a person on site, certified in food safety, at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. (Individual(s) currently due to take and test for food safety. Confirmation of successful completion to be submitted to inspector. Currently no hot holding of food items being conducted.) New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

At the time of inspection, the establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered/licensed with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. (Individual currently taking food safety course and test to become Registered Certified food safety manager for the location. Successful completion and submission of application to RIDOH CFP to be submitted to inspector.) (Currently no hot holding of food items being conducted.) New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

Baked Goods food items set for customer self-selection were observed to be lacking proper ingredient information. Food items removed from bulk and set for customer self-selection are to have labels available with the common name of the food and a list of ingredients/allergens for customer viewing. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2024

At the time of inspection, the sanitizing solution dispenser on the wall was observed to not be dispensing properly. PIC is to ensure the sanitizing solution at the 3 bay sink is manually mixed and tested whenever needed for proper washing/rinsing/sanitizing of equipment and utensils. PEr the PIC, a workorder is in place currently. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in need of repair... - Floor tiles were observed to be in poor repair (Cracked/Chipped). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2025

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue, dust, and debris... - The floor in the walk-in cooler was observed to have debris and/or standing water under/behind shelving equipment - The air vents and ceiling tiles around them were observed to an accumulation of dust The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2024

At the time of inspection, there was no individual on site certified in food safety. There is to be a person on site, certified in food safety, at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

At the time of inspection, the establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered/licensed with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 - 400 ppm. PIC is to ensure that the sanitizer is properly manually mixed and tested due to wall mounted mixer unit not working properly. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

Baked Goods food items set for customer self-selection were observed to be lacking proper ingredient information. Food items removed from bulk and set for customer self-selection are to have labels available with the common name of the food and a list of ingredients/allergens for customer viewing. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2024
Food/Beverage items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

At the time of inspection, the sanitizing solution dispenser on the wall was observed to not be dispensing properly. PIC is to ensure the sanitizing solution at the 3 bay sink is manually mixed and tested whenever needed for proper washing/rinsing/sanitizing of equipment and utensils. PEr the PIC, a workorder is in place currently. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in need of repair... - Floor tiles were observed to be in poor repair (Cracked/Chipped). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2025

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue, dust, and debris... - The floor in the walk-in cooler was observed to have debris and/or standing water under/behind shelving equipment - The air vents and ceiling tiles around them were observed to an accumulation of dust The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2024
